inputLabel: Write the first line of the for loop:

questions.html: Write a loop that runs exactly 4 times
questions.notice: for i in range(4): or for i in range(0, 4):

questions.html: Write a loop that runs exactly 10 times
questions.notice: for i in range(10): or for i in range(0, 10):

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 1 to 5
questions.notice: for i in range(1, 6): — stop value must be 6 to include 5

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 0 to 9
questions.notice: for i in range(10): or for i in range(0, 10):

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 3 to 7
questions.notice: for i in range(3, 8): — starts at 3 and stops before 8

questions.html: Write a loop that runs exactly once
questions.notice: for i in range(1): or for i in range(0, 1):

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 5 to 9
questions.notice: for i in range(5, 10): — starts at 5 and stops before 10

questions.html: Write a loop that runs exactly 3 times
questions.notice: for i in range(3): or for i in range(0, 3):

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 0 to 4
questions.notice: for i in range(5): or for i in range(0, 5):

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 1 to 10
questions.notice: for i in range(1, 11): — stop value must be 11 to include 10

questions.html: Write a loop where i goes from 2 to 6
questions.notice: for i in range(2, 7): — starts at 2 and stops before 7

questions.html: Write a loop that runs exactly 100 times
questions.notice: for i in range(100): or for i in range(0, 100):
